news.headline: Iran: Saudi Arabia warns of 'military action' over repeated attacks
news.summary: Saudi Arabia warned that it had 'reserved the right to take 'military actions' over #Iran's repeated attacks on the kingdom, as fresh trikes hit Riyadh during a summit of regional foreign ministers. The comment marks a turn in the #Gulf's reaction to Iran's strikes on its neighbours since the start

news.headline: DR Congo and Rwanda agree to ease tensions after talks in US
news.summary: The conflict has persisted despite a peace deal signed by DR Congo and Rwanda in December.
